name: Pandora CI/CD Pipeline with Quality Gates

parameters.command:
#!/bin/bash
PROJECT='{{$json["project_name"]}}'
REPO_URL='{{$json["repository_url"]}}'
COMMIT='{{$json["commit_sha"]}}'

echo "Starting CI/CD Pipeline for $PROJECT"
echo "Repository: $REPO_URL"
echo "Commit: $COMMIT"

# Clone repository
git clone $REPO_URL /tmp/build-$PROJECT
cd /tmp/build-$PROJECT
git checkout $COMMIT

# Detect project type
if [ -f package.json ]; then
    echo "Node.js project detected"
    npm ci
    npm run build || exit 1
elif [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
    echo "Python project detected"
    pip install -r requirements.txt
    python -m compileall . || exit 1
elif [ -f go.mod ]; then
    echo "Go project detected"
    go build ./... || exit 1
fi

echo "Build completed successfully"

#!/bin/bash
PROJECT='{{$json["project_name"]}}'
MIN_COVERAGE='{{$json["minimum_coverage"]}}'

cd /tmp/build-$PROJECT

echo "Running test suite with coverage..."

# Run tests based on project type
if [ -f package.json ]; then
    # Node.js testing
    npm run test:coverage || TEST_FAILED=true
    COVERAGE=$(cat coverage/coverage-summary.json | jq '.total.lines.pct')
elif [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
    # Python testing
    pytest --cov=. --cov-report=json || TEST_FAILED=true
    COVERAGE=$(cat coverage.json | jq '.totals.percent_covered')
elif [ -f go.mod ]; then
    # Go testing
    go test -cover ./... -coverprofile=coverage.out || TEST_FAILED=true
    COVERAGE=$(go tool cover -func=coverage.out | grep total | awk '{print $3}' | sed 's/%//')
fi

echo "Coverage: ${COVERAGE}%"
echo "Minimum required: ${MIN_COVERAGE}%"

# Check coverage threshold
if (( $(echo "$COVERAGE < $MIN_COVERAGE" | bc -l) )); then
    echo "ERROR: Coverage ${COVERAGE}% is below minimum ${MIN_COVERAGE}%"
    exit 1
fi

# Check if tests passed
if [ "$TEST_FAILED" = true ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Tests failed"
    exit 1
fi

echo '{"coverage": '"$COVERAGE"', "tests_passed": true}'

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO cicd.pipeline_runs (
    project_id,
    run_number,
    trigger_type,
    commit_sha,
    commit_message,
    commit_author,
    branch,
    status,
    started_at,
    ai_agent_used
) VALUES (
    (SELECT id FROM cicd.projects WHERE name = '{{$json["project_name"]}}'),
    (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(run_number), 0) + 1 FROM cicd.pipeline_runs WHERE project_id = (SELECT id FROM cicd.projects WHERE name = '{{$json["project_name"]}}')),
    '{{$json["trigger_type"]}}',
    '{{$json["commit_sha"]}}',
    '{{$json["commit_message"]}}',
    '{{$json["commit_author"]}}',
    '{{$json["branch"]}}',
    'running',
    NOW(),
    '{{$json["ai_agent"]}}'
) RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO cicd.test_results (
    pipeline_run_id,
    test_suite,
    test_file,
    test_name,
    status,
    duration_ms
) VALUES 
{{$json["test_results"].map(test => 
    `(${$json["pipeline_run_id"]}, '${test.suite}', '${test.file}', '${test.name}', '${test.status}', ${test.duration})`
).join(',\n')}};

INSERT INTO cicd.coverage_reports (
    pipeline_run_id,
    line_coverage_percent,
    branch_coverage_percent,
    function_coverage_percent,
    statement_coverage_percent,
    total_lines,
    covered_lines,
    meets_minimum_threshold,
    threshold_used
) VALUES (
    {{$json["pipeline_run_id"]}},
    {{$json["coverage"]["line_percent"]}},
    {{$json["coverage"]["branch_percent"]}},
    {{$json["coverage"]["function_percent"]}},
    {{$json["coverage"]["statement_percent"]}},
    {{$json["coverage"]["total_lines"]}},
    {{$json["coverage"]["covered_lines"]}},
    {{$json["coverage"]["meets_threshold"]}},
    {{$json["minimum_coverage"]}}
);

parameters.command:
#!/bin/bash
PROJECT='{{$json["project_name"]}}'

cd /tmp/build-$PROJECT

echo "Checking documentation..."

# Check README exists and is updated
if [ ! -f README.md ]; then
    echo "ERROR: README.md not found"
    DOC_STATUS="missing"
else
    # Check if README was updated in recent commits
    LAST_DOC_UPDATE=$(git log -1 --format="%ar" -- README.md)
    echo "README last updated: $LAST_DOC_UPDATE"
    DOC_STATUS="present"
fi

# Check for API documentation
API_DOCS="false"
if [ -f "docs/api.md" ] || [ -f "swagger.json" ] || [ -f "openapi.yaml" ]; then
    API_DOCS="true"
    echo "API documentation found"
fi

# Check for inline code documentation
echo "Checking inline documentation..."
if [ -f package.json ]; then
    # JavaScript/TypeScript
    COMMENT_LINES=$(find . -name "*.js" -o -name "*.ts" | xargs grep -c "^\s*//\|^\s*/\*" | paste -sd+ | bc)
elif [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
    # Python
    COMMENT_LINES=$(find . -name "*.py" | xargs grep -c "^\s*#\|\"\"\"" | paste -sd+ | bc)
fi

TOTAL_LINES=$(find . -type f \( -name "*.js" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.go" \) | xargs wc -l | tail -1 | awk '{print $1}')
DOC_RATIO=$(echo "scale=2; $COMMENT_LINES * 100 / $TOTAL_LINES" | bc)

echo "Documentation ratio: ${DOC_RATIO}%"
echo '{"readme_status": "'$DOC_STATUS'", "api_docs": '$API_DOCS', "inline_doc_ratio": '$DOC_RATIO'}'

parameters.query:
-- Check all quality gates
INSERT INTO cicd.quality_gates (
    pipeline_run_id,
    gate_name,
    gate_type,
    required_value,
    actual_value,
    passed,
    is_blocking
) VALUES 
    ({{$json["pipeline_run_id"]}}, 'Minimum Test Coverage', 'coverage', {{$json["minimum_coverage"]}}, {{$json["coverage"]["line_percent"]}}, {{$json["coverage"]["meets_threshold"]}}, true),
    ({{$json["pipeline_run_id"]}}, 'All Tests Pass', 'tests', 100, {{$json["test_pass_rate"]}}, {{$json["all_tests_passed"]}}, true),
    ({{$json["pipeline_run_id"]}}, 'Documentation Present', 'documentation', 1, {{$json["docs_present"] ? 1 : 0}}, {{$json["docs_present"]}}, true),
    ({{$json["pipeline_run_id"]}}, 'Build Success', 'build', 1, {{$json["build_success"] ? 1 : 0}}, {{$json["build_success"]}}, true);

-- Check Definition of Done
SELECT cicd.check_definition_of_done({{$json["pipeline_run_id"]}});

-- Generate final build report
SELECT cicd.generate_build_report({{$json["pipeline_run_id"]}});

-- Get report summary
SELECT 
    br.*,
    pr.project_id,
    pr.commit_sha,
    pr.branch,
    p.name as project_name
FROM cicd.build_reports br
JOIN cicd.pipeline_runs pr ON br.pipeline_run_id = pr.id
JOIN cicd.projects p ON pr.project_id = p.id
WHERE br.pipeline_run_id = {{$json["pipeline_run_id"]}};

parameters.subject: ✅ Build Success: {{$json["project_name"]}} #{{$json["run_number"]}}
❌ Build Failed: {{$json["project_name"]}} #{{$json["run_number"]}}

parameters.query:
UPDATE cicd.pipeline_runs SET
    status = '{{$json["final_status"]}}',
    completed_at = NOW(),
    duration_seconds = EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - started_at)),
    build_success = {{$json["build_success"]}},
    tests_passed = {{$json["tests_passed"]}},
    coverage_met = {{$json["coverage_met"]}},
    definition_of_done_met = {{$json["dod_met"]}}
WHERE id = {{$json["pipeline_run_id"]}};
